technical_seo_issues.detail: canonicalURL computed in Base.astro but never rendered as <link> element
No JSON-LD for FAQPage, Article, Organization, or BreadcrumbList
Base.astro falls back to deflocksc.netlify.app if Astro.site undefined
Newest SC ALPR bill with strictest provisions not included in bill tracker

recommendations.action: Publish the 4 draft blog posts by setting draft: false in frontmatter of 99-percent-of-the-plates-they-scan.md, flock-safetys-track-record.md, sc-has-no-license-plate-camera-law.md, and the-4th-amendment-loophole.md
Add <link rel='canonical' href={canonicalURL} /> to the <head> section in src/layouts/Base.astro after the existing meta description tag
Rewrite homepage title to 'DeflockSC -- Stop ALPR Surveillance in South Carolina | License Plate Reader Oversight'
Install @astrojs/sitemap and create public/robots.txt pointing to sitemap
Add FAQPage JSON-LD structured data to FAQ.astro using the existing faqs array
Add internal links to footer: Home, Toolkit, Blog, Camera Map, Bill Tracker, Take Action
Rewrite toolkit title to 'ALPR Surveillance Toolkit -- FOIA Templates & Legal Resources | DeflockSC' and blog title to 'ALPR & License Plate Surveillance News -- DeflockSC Blog'
Break toolkit into 4 separate URL-based pages (/toolkit/foia, /toolkit/speaking, /toolkit/outreach, /toolkit/legal) each with unique title, meta description, and H1
Create a 'What is ALPR' explainer page targeting top-of-funnel definitional queries
Add 3-5 internal links to every blog post linking to homepage sections, toolkit pages, and other blog posts. Add links from homepage sections to relevant blog posts.
Add Article JSON-LD structured data to blog post template with headline, datePublished, author, description, and image
Add SC Bill H.4675 to bill tracker and write a blog post covering its stricter ALPR provisions

Optimize H1 tags: homepage to include 'ALPR Surveillance' or 'License Plate Cameras', toolkit to 'ALPR Surveillance Toolkit for South Carolina Residents', blog index to 'ALPR Surveillance News & Research'
